sections.name: I_ignition
sections.character: fundamental alone; partials 2 and 3 fade in; sparse vocal seeding

sections.name: II_first_chant
sections.character: theme A stated plainly, then ornamented, then doubled

sections.name: III_answering_voices
sections.character: countersubject enters; theme passed between voices

sections.name: IV_climbing_the_partials
sections.character: voices climb the overtone ladder; intensifies into climax

sections.name: V_burn
sections.character: rhythmic pulse emerges; all voices at max density

sections.name: VI_return_to_the_lamp
sections.character: voices depart; theme stated one final time; fundamental alone

ornamentation.rule: Microtonal inflection is obligatory on every sustained note (±25 cents). In Section V rhythmic ornament (hang + pot offbeats) supplements this; in other sections the inflection alone is the ornament.
